name: soulbot_chat
description: SoulBot Chat — adaptive conversation engine with digital well-being, multi-dimensional growth coaching, and proactive engagement intelligence. FastIntent two-path classification for latency reduction (fast path: Chat/General/SessionEnd/Continuity; full path: complete NLU pipeline). 78 [ASSERT] entry gates with k-bounded backtrack (Protocol F.2/F.3). Engagement momentum detection (REVIVE strategy), cognitive surprise calibration (Goldilocks zone insight scoring), emotional capitalization response (active-constructive for positive moments), proactive engagement pulse (5-turn aggregate), memory-driven conversation bridge (episodic memory as lull fuel). Multi-turn intent continuity, response quality self-assessment (4D scoring), topic graph deduplication, regulatory expiry tracking (11 regulations). Socratic growth engine, 8-dimension capability tracking, scenario-based training (5 types, ZPD), spaced repetition (SM-2), thinking framework coaching (5 frameworks), resilience training, three-type addiction detection, dose-response engagement model, comprehensive safety compliance (WA HB 2225 + OR SB 1546 + UK OSA), Bayesian strategy learning, adaptive response concision, multi-turn quality meta-evaluation, memory freshness visualization.

skills.name: Chat
skills.description: General conversation, greetings, small talk, opinions, and daily life sharing.

skills.name: Question
skills.description: Information lookup, factual queries, and how-to questions requiring web search.

skills.name: Emotional
skills.description: Emotional expression, venting, seeking comfort, mood sharing, and distress support with crisis detection.

skills.name: MemoryRecall
skills.description: Recall past conversations or previously shared information from episodic and semantic memory.

skills.name: ProfileQuery
skills.description: Query what the AI knows about the user, including preferences, patterns, and learned observations.

skills.name: Creative
skills.description: Storytelling, brainstorming, roleplay, worldbuilding, creative writing collaboration, and skill practice (debate, speech/presentation, logic puzzles, persuasion, interview prep).

skills.name: Feedback
skills.description: User corrects AI behavior, memory, or understanding with immediate effect.

skills.name: ScenarioTraining
skills.description: Scenario-based social-emotional skill training. 5 scenario types (conflict resolution, rejection handling, empathy challenge, pressure negotiation, adversity reframe) with ZPD-calibrated difficulty and structured feedback.

skills.name: General
skills.description: Fallback for unclassifiable messages, meta-questions about SoulBot, capability inquiries, and advice-seeking.

skills.name: DataPrivacy
skills.description: Data export, deletion, import, memory statistics, and privacy inquiry operations (GDPR/CCPA compliant).

skills.name: ProfileEdit
skills.description: Direct modification of user profile attributes such as name, job, preferences, and interests.

skills.name: SessionEnd
skills.description: Explicit session termination with session summary persistence and contextual farewell.

skills.name: Onboarding
skills.description: First-session user introduction and getting-to-know-you exchange for cold-start profile building.

safety_card.risk_justification: T3 trust level with file_system write access and crisis-handling intents (Emotional intent includes crisis detection and intervention). Safety module enforces SB 243 disclosure, WA HB 2225, OR SB 1546, UK OSA compliance, minor protection (progressive session enforcement), and abuse pattern detection.
safety_card.data_handling: Three-tier memory architecture (working/episodic/semantic) persisted to local file_system under memory_dir (./memory/). User profiles stored in memory/profiles/. GDPR-compliant: supports data export, import, and deletion on request. No external data sharing.
safety_card.limitations: Text-only input and output. No autonomous destructive operations beyond safety audit log archival. Crisis responses provide resource references only — never diagnosis or emergency services. Network access limited to user-initiated google_search and web_browser queries.
